message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 2
skinparam lifelineColor #000000
skinparam lifelineThickness 1
skinparam lifelineStyle dashed

participant Player
participant Turn
participant TrainsDeck
participant RoutesDeck
participant Track
participant Route

note over Player, Turn
Created with plantuml ttr.uml
Cf. http://plantuml.com/sequence.html
end note

Player -> Turn: Start

group Draw Train Cards, OR
    Turn -> TrainsDeck: 1 Draw Cards
    TrainsDeck -> Player: 2 Cards Drawn
end group

group Draw Route Cards, OR
    Turn -> RoutesDeck: 1 Draw Cards
    RoutesDeck -> Player: 2 Cards Drawn
end group

group Build Track
    Turn -> Track: 1 Build
    Track -> Player: 2 Add Completed By
    Track -> Route: 3 Completed?
    Route -> Player: 4 Add Completed By
end group

@enduml
